Impact: Users may fail to authenticate or access domain resources
Treatment: Reduce with DC01/DC02 redundancy and AD-integrated DNS

Impact: Microsoft 365 domain verification or mail delivery may fail
Treatment: Reduce with documented DNS record plan and staged validation

Impact: Internal AD records may be enumerated by attackers
Treatment: Avoid by using managed public DNS and keeping AD DNS private

Impact: Inbound email may route to wrong mail system
Treatment: Delay MX cutover until Project 03 validation

Impact: Mail may fail authentication or spoofing risk may increase
Treatment: Use Microsoft 365 SPF format and validate after publishing

Risk: Overly strict DMARC policy too early
Treatment: Start with p=none for monitoring before enforcement

Impact: Record updates may be delayed during incidents
Treatment: Document DNS owner and hosting provider
